title: Pizzacraft
description: A pack inspired by the Pizza Tower artstyle!
body:
So utterly obsessed with Pizza Tower that you have to connect it to everything you play? Well, I am! That's why I made this! 

This pack attempts to recreate the game's artstyle, as well as including plenty of nods to various aspects from it and tangentially pizza-related stuff.

There are very few modified sounds as of now, but I hope to add more as well as custom entity models in the future!
<hr>

Follow me on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/Chelophyll) or on [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/chelophyll.bsky.social) for sneak peeks and junk.
